about.title: Tea aroma, mountain character
about.body: Aroadri comes from Aroma and Adri, a Sanskrit word meaning mountain. The identity meets the visual language of shanshui: mountain, cloud, and water as symbols of calm, purity, and craft.

pillars.title: Nature Aroma
pillars.desc: Each drink is designed to carry a clean, gentle tea aroma.

pillars.title: Adri
pillars.desc: Adri means mountain, the inspiration behind the logo, store atmosphere, and calm character.

pillars.title: Modern Chinese Tea
pillars.desc: Oolong, jasmine green, ceylon black, roasted yellow, and biluochun are served in a modern format.

locations.title: Aroadri Tea Locations
locations.subtitle: Two active outlets in the Malioboro area, Yogyakarta.
locations.empty: No active outlet is available yet.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of the Aroadri Tea website, member registration, digital card, points, vouchers, and customer-service features. By creating an account or using member benefits, you confirm that you have read and agreed to these terms.

sections.title: Parties and scope
sections.body: The member service is provided by PT. Gandha Hill Catering Management Indonesia for the Aroadri Tea brand. These terms apply to member registration, use of a registered phone number at the outlet, digital cards, points, vouchers, promotions, account communication, and other features connected to Aroadri Tea systems.

sections.title: Eligibility and account registration
sections.body: Members must provide accurate, active, and reachable information. Aroadri Tea may reject, delay, or deactivate registration if the data is invalid, duplicated, misused, or used in a way that harms other customers, outlets, or systems.

sections.title: In-store member use
sections.body: During checkout, the cashier may ask whether the customer has a member account. If yes, the customer provides the registered phone number, the cashier looks up the member data, and the cashier confirms the member name before recording points, vouchers, or other transaction benefits.

sections.title: Points, vouchers, and promotions
sections.body: Points, vouchers, tiers, rewards, expiry dates, minimum purchase rules, excluded products, and redemption mechanisms follow the active program terms. Benefits cannot be exchanged for cash, transferred without Aroadri Tea approval, or claimed for cancelled, refunded, suspicious, or ineligible transactions.

sections.title: Account security and prohibited use
sections.body: Members are responsible for protecting their email, phone number, and password access. Fake accounts, impersonation, transaction manipulation, scraping, reverse engineering, unauthorized access attempts, or actions that disrupt the website, ERP, POS, or outlet operations are prohibited.

sections.title: Transaction corrections and service interruptions
sections.body: If there is any discrepancy in points, vouchers, member status, or system operation, Aroadri Tea may verify receipts, transaction history, system logs, and outlet data. Corrections may be made when recording errors or misuse are identified.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Aroadri Tea works to keep the service available and accurate, but does not guarantee that the website or member features will always be uninterrupted. To the extent permitted by law, Aroadri Tea's responsibility is limited to data correction, recovery of valid benefits, or reasonable operational remedies.

sections.title: Changes to these terms
sections.body: Aroadri Tea may update these terms to reflect operational changes, promotional programs, security needs, or legal obligations. The latest version will be published on the website and applies from the stated effective date.

sections.title: Governing law and contact
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Questions, complaints, data corrections, or account-related requests may be sent through Aroadri Tea's official channels, including Instagram and TikTok @aroadri.tea.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Aroadri Tea collects, uses, stores, protects, and deletes member personal data in line with Indonesian personal data protection principles, including Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection and applicable electronic system regulations.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body: The data controller for Aroadri Tea member services is PT. Gandha Hill Catering Management Indonesia. Data is processed for outlet operations, customer service, loyalty programs, transaction audit, system security, and legal compliance.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: The data collected may include name, email, phone number, city, birth date if provided, secured account credentials, email status, digital card, points, vouchers, language preference, member-related transaction history, consent logs, device or browser data, IP address, and customer-service records.

sections.title: Legal basis and purposes
sections.body: Data is processed based on member consent, the need to provide member services, legitimate interests in security and audit, and bookkeeping or legal obligations. Data is used for account verification, cashier lookup by phone number, point recording, voucher issuance, complaint handling, fraud prevention, and communication relevant to the account or service.

sections.title: Data sharing
sections.body: Data may be accessed by authorized Aroadri Tea personnel and service providers supporting system operations, such as hosting, database, transactional email, security, internal analytics, and backups. Aroadri Tea does not sell member personal data. Sharing with other parties only occurs when required for the service, required by law, or approved by the member.

sections.title: Data security
sections.body: Aroadri Tea applies role-based access restrictions, authentication, audit logs, encryption or hashing for sensitive data according to system design, backups, and error monitoring. No security method is completely risk-free, but incidents affecting personal data will be handled according to procedure and applicable law.

sections.title: Storage and retention
sections.body: Member data is stored while the account is active or as long as needed for service delivery, transaction audit, bookkeeping, dispute handling, security, and legal obligations. Data that is no longer required will be deleted, anonymized, or restricted where technically and legally possible.

sections.title: Member rights
sections.body: Members may request access, correction, updates, processing restriction, withdrawal of consent, or account deletion through Aroadri Tea's official channels. Requests may be refused or limited if they conflict with legal obligations, bookkeeping, fraud investigation, security, or other parties' rights.

sections.title: Cookies and similar technologies
sections.body: The website may use cookies or local storage to maintain sessions, language preferences, security, and user experience. Some cookies are necessary for login, registration, and member features to work properly.

sections.title: Policy updates and contact
sections.body: This policy may be updated from time to time. Questions or personal data requests may be sent through Aroadri Tea's official channels, including Instagram and TikTok @aroadri.tea.
